Issue exists and has erk-objective label 80→ 2. Roadmap parses successfully (v2 format required) 81→ 3. Status/PR consistency (done steps should have PRs) 82→ 4. No orphaned statuses (done without PR reference) 83→ 5. Phase numbering is sequential 84→ 6. v2 format integrity (objective-header has objective_comment_id) 85→ 7. Plan/PR references use # prefix 86→ 87→ This function does not produce output or raise SystemExit. 88→ 89→ Returns: 90→ ObjectiveValidationSuccess if validation completed 91→ ObjectiveValidationError if unable to complete validation 92→ """ 93→ checks: list[tuple[bool, str]] = [] 94→ 95→ # Fetch issue 96→ issue = github_issues.get_issue(repo_root, issue_number) 97→ if isinstance(issue, IssueNotFound): 98→ return ObjectiveValidationError(error=f"Issue #{issue_number} not found") 99→ 100→ # Check 1: erk-objective label

session.assistant: Now I need to add tripwires to the relevant category files. The plan mentions new tripwires from Steps 3-5. Let me read the existing tripwires files I need to update:
session.tool_result: 1→--- 2→title: Planning Tripwires 3→read_when: 4→ - "working on planning code" 5→--- 6→ 7→ 8→ 9→ 10→ 11→# Planning Tripwires 12→ 13→Rules triggered by matching actions in code. 14→ 15→**adding inside elements in PR bodies** → Read [Planned PR Lifecycle](planned-pr-lifecycle.md) first. Graphite doesn't render inside — use plain text instead. GitHub renders it but Graphite does not. The correct format is original-plan not original-plan. 16→ 17→**adding Closes #N to a planned PR footer** → Read [Planned PR Lifecycle](planned-pr-lifecycle.md) first. Planned PR IS the plan. Self-referential close would close the plan itself. Use issue_number=None for github-draft-pr backend. 18→ 19→**adding a new PR-dependent step to trigger-async-learn** → Read [Learn Without PR Context](learn-without-pr-context.md) first. Any new PR-dependent step must handle the None case from \_get_pr_for_plan_direct. The entire PR comment block is gated on pr_result not being None. 20→ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

1→--- 2→title: Erk Tripwires 3→read_when: 4→ - "working on erk code" 5→--- 6→ 7→<!-- AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY --> 8→<!-- Edit source frontmatter, then run 'erk docs sync' to regenerate. --> 9→<!-- Generated from erk/*.md frontmatter --> 10→ 11→# Erk Tripwires 12→ 13→Rules triggered by matching actions in code. 14→ 15→**adding a new cleanup path in land_cmd.py without calling \_ensure_branch_not_checked_out()** → Read [Multi-Path Branch Cleanup in Land](four-path-cleanup.md) first. All cleanup paths must call \_ensure_branch_not_checked_out() before branch deletion. Git refuses to delete branches checked out in any worktree. 16→ 17→**adding a new step to the bootstrap sequence** → Read [Codespace Remote Execution Pattern](codespace-remote-execution.md) first. This affects ALL remote commands. The bootstrap runs on every SSH invocation, so added steps must be idempotent and fast. 18→ 19→**assuming dispatch_ref is project-level config** → Read [dispatch_ref Configuration](dispatch-ref-config.md) first. dispatch_ref is repo-level config (.erk/config.toml), overridable at local level (.erk/config.local.toml). It is not project-level. 20→

1→--- 2→title: Impl-Context Staging Directory 3→read_when: 4→ - "working with .erk/impl-context/ files" 5→ - "debugging plan content missing from a draft-PR implementation" 6→ - "reviewing a PR that contains .erk/impl-context/ files" 7→ - "understanding how draft-PR plans transfer content to .erk/impl-context/" 8→tripwires: 9→ - action: "reviewing a PR that contains .erk/impl-context/ files" 10→ warning: "Leave a PR comment telling the author to remove .erk/impl-context/. This is an erk tooling error — the directory should have been cleaned up before implementation. Run: git rm -rf .erk/impl-context/ && git commit -m 'Remove leaked impl-context'" 11→ - action: "removing git-tracked temporary directories in setup scripts" 12→ warning: "Defer deletion to the git cleanup phase (git rm + commit + push), not shutil.rmtree(). setup_impl_from_pr.py reads the files but deliberately does NOT delete them. Deletion is handled by plan-implement.md Step 2d." 13→ score: 8 14→ - action: "adding a new setup path to plan-implement without routing through Step 2d" 15→ warning: "Impl-context cleanup routing: all code paths that set up an implementation context must route through Step 2d in plan-implement.md, which is the single convergence point for .erk/impl-context/ cleanup. Adding a new setup path that bypasses Step 2d will silently skip cleanup, leaving .erk/impl-context/ files in the final PR diff." 16→ score: 9 17→ - action: "calling `create_impl_context()` without checking `impl_context_exists()` first" 18→ warning: "Both submit paths use LBYL: `if impl_context_exists(): remove_impl_context()` before creating. Stale .erk/impl-context/ from a prior failed submission causes errors." 19→ - action: "pushing implementation commits after impl-context cleanup without git pull --rebase" 20→ warning: "After git rm + commit + push of .erk/impl-context/, the local branch may diverge from remote if other commits were pushed. Run git pull --rebase before pushing further implementation commits to avoid non-fast-forward push failures." 21→ score: 4 22→--- 23→ 24→# Impl-Context Staging Directory 25→

| Step | File | Change | |------|------|--------| | 1 | `architecture/github-api-retry-mechanism.md` | Added `unexpected end of json input` to transient error pattern list | | 2 | `cli/activation-scripts.md` | Fixed guard scope: `uv sync`/`uv pip install` are OUTSIDE guard (always run), not inside | | 3 | `planning/impl-context.md` | Added cleanup-impl-context exec script docs, plnd/ skip saga, new tripwire | | 4 | `erk/slot-pool-architecture.md` | Documented untracked file handling in `find_inactive_slot()`, new tripwire | | 5 | `erk/worktree-branch-mismatch.md` | **New file** — two-stage lookup with path-based fallback for branch mismatch | | 6 | `integrations/cmux-integration.md` | **New file** — cmux workspace rename command and TUI integration | | 7 | `planning/planned-pr-lifecycle.md` | Added type naming history (IssueNextSteps → PlanNextSteps etc.) | | 8 | `objectives/objective-lifecycle.md` | Documented roadmap-free objectives (three-case distinction in parse_roadmap) | | 9 | 5 auto-generated files | `erk docs sync` regenerated indexes and tripwires |
